# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Allow frontend service account to access specific API endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "default"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    # Allow order-processing service account to manage orders
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/order-processing-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "default"
              - "processing"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "PATCH"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
              - "/api/v1/inventory"
              - "/api/v1/inventory/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    # Allow monitoring service account read-only access to health and metrics
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/grafana-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/metrics"
            ports:
              - "8080"
              - "9090"

    # Allow admin service account full access
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/admin/sa/admin-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "PATCH"
              - "DELETE"
            paths:
              - "/api/*"
              - "/admin/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

---
# Deny-all policy for services that should not receive external traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-internal-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: internal-database-service
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notPrincipals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/backend-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/order-processing-service-account"
            notNamespaces:
              - "default"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"

---
# Custom action policy for external traffic requiring JWT validation
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt-for-external-access
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://accounts.example.com/*"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/*"
      when:
        - key: request.auth.claims[iss]
          values:
            - "https://accounts.example.com"
        - key: request.auth.claims[scope]
          values:
            - "read"
            - "write"
